rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they relate to component ports
Use implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings such as assignments
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Use assign only when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable in implementation scope
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations in assumptions and guarantees
Write output dependency guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants
Use implementation-level assignments to bind subcomponent outputs when needed
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `assume "label": expression;` and `guarantee "label": expression;` for contracts
Use `eq name : type = expression;` for equations and `const name : type = value;` for constants
Use `assign output = expression;` for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL property associations as AGREE variables
